title: Golden Kamuy Final Season (English Dub) - Episode 59 - Our Kamuy
content: The final search for the gold begins at Goryoukaku as the 7th Division closes in.

content: The location of the gold is finally revealed.

title: Theatre of Darkness: Yamishibai 16 - Episode 11 - Dream Connection
content: This is the story of a certain student who lives in a dormitory…
author: Crunchyroll

title: Fate/strange Fake - Episode 12 - At the End of the Rope
content: Cerberus stands before Saber and Ayaka inside the dreamworld. Though the police were fighting alongside them, the wounds Saber bore from his previous battle has put him in a critical situation. In an attempt to shake off the weakness that dwells within her, Ayaka hurries to be by his side.
author: Crunchyroll

title: TRIGUN STARGAZE - Episode 23 - I Miss You.
content: Knives arrives and captures Vash. His final plan is set in motion - as well as Vash's final resistance.
author: Crunchyroll

title: TRIGUN STARGAZE (German Dub) - Episode 20 - Good Bye, My Friend
content: Wolfwood helps Vash break out of the Ark, but is pursued by Razlo, Livio's alter ego.
author: Crunchyroll

title: TRIGUN STARGAZE (English Dub) - Episode 21 - Reunion
content: The crew, with its latest new member Livio, regroup at Hopeland to kick off their plan to stop Knives.
